utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 corresponding keys are present. Now check if each is fully specified with required details: (1) health_coverage: specifies insurer/product names, monthly costs, total, who is covered (family of 4), and some included conditions; includes costs, so fully specified. (2) property_coverage: specifies insurer/product, monthly cost, mentions coverage for home contents and €3,000 kitchen equipment; includes costs, so sufficiently specified. (3) travel_coverage: specifies insurer/product, monthly costs, total, and scope (comprehensive international family and business travel); includes costs, so fully specified. (4) additional_services: explicitly states None and references eliminated prior €50/month; includes costs context; acceptable as specified. (5) total_budget: provides monthly total and annual total with savings versus previous spend; includes complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Therefore, all 5/5 items are included and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan mentions three insurance selections: LifeFirst Standard Health and LifeFirst Standard Mental Health under health_coverage, InsurePlus Standard Property under property_coverage, and InsurePlus Standard Travel with a Business Travel Extension under travel_coverage. From the ground-truth ratings: LifeFirst Standard Plan exists in both physical health (rating 8) and mental health (rating 8). For property, InsurePlus Standard Coverage has rating 7 (home_content). For travel, InsurePlus Standard Plan has rating 7. The 'Business Travel Extension' is not a standalone item in the ground-truth ratings, so only InsurePlus Standard Plan can be mapped for travel.
